questions.question: How many players are on a standard soccer team on the field?
questions.explanation: Each team fields 11 players including the goalkeeper.

questions.question: In which sport would you perform a 'slam dunk'?
questions.explanation: A slam dunk is when a player jumps and scores by pushing the ball through the hoop.

questions.question: What country hosted the 2016 Summer Olympics?
questions.explanation: The 2016 Olympics were held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

questions.question: Who holds the record for the most Grand Slam titles in tennis (men's)?
questions.explanation: Djokovic has won 24 Grand Slam singles titles.

questions.question: In cricket, how many runs is a 'century'?
questions.explanation: Scoring 100 or more runs in a single innings is called a century.

questions.question: What is the diameter of a basketball hoop in inches?
questions.explanation: The official NBA rim diameter is 18 inches (45.7 cm).

questions.question: In which year were women first allowed to compete in the Olympic Games?
questions.explanation: Women first competed at the 1900 Paris Olympics in tennis, sailing, croquet, and golf.

questions.question: What is the only country to have played in every FIFA World Cup?
questions.explanation: Brazil has participated in all 22 FIFA World Cup tournaments since 1930.

questions.question: What martial art is an Olympic sport that originated in Korea?
questions.explanation: Taekwondo became an official Olympic sport at the 2000 Sydney Games.

questions.question: What sport is played at Wimbledon?
questions.explanation: Wimbledon is the oldest tennis tournament, first held in 1877.
